segments.text: He goes back into the pokeball like he's not even being threatened by these aerials and he gets finally a grab is punished by the up smash

full_text: He goes back into the pokeball like he's not even being threatened by these aerials and he gets finally a grab is punished by the up smash

corrections.original: these areas and he gets finally a grab his punish by the up smash
corrections.corrected: these aerials and he gets finally a grab is punished by the up smash
corrections.rule: Smash term: areas→aerials; garbled: his punish→is punished
